strategy: He constantly summons: a Spiderling and, when no minions remain, another copy of himself; carry AoE to keep the board clear.
Do not cast Auras. An Aura makes him respond with Mass Supernova.
Do not cast negative Charms on him. Any negative charm, even as a secondary effect, triggers Insane Bolt for up to 1,550 to your whole team.
Every second Round he casts Shift Malistaire for 85 Death per pip; keep shields up on that timer.
After some turns he casts a Death Morganthe attack for 100% of a wizard's health, so keep everyone healthy and do not overextend.
Solo him if you can; with two or more wizards he punishes stacked blades, Globals, and traps by removing them.
cheatNotes: Every second Round he hits a random wizard with Shift Malistaire for 85 Death per pip; expect chip damage on that timer.
Casting an Aura makes him retaliate with Mass Supernova; skip Auras here.
He summons a Spiderling minion; keep AoE ready.
With no minions left he summons another copy of himself, so the board rarely stays empty.
Any negative Charm you place makes him Insane Bolt your whole team for 550, 1,050, or 1,550; avoid weaknesses, mantles, and infections.
Spells that apply a negative charm as a side effect also set off the Insane Bolt; check secondary effects before casting.
After an unpredictable number of turns he casts a Morganthe attack for 100% of a wizard's health; keep everyone near full and end the fight before it stacks up.
With two or more wizards, the first blade, Global, or trap each turn just gets a verbal response; the danger is a second one below.
If a second wizard casts the same hanging-effect type that turn, he punishes it, so coordinate to avoid doubling up.
A second blade or Global in one turn makes him Enfeeble off all your blades; stagger your buffs across turns.
A second trap in one turn makes him Cleanse all your traps; place traps one wizard per turn.
